## Epic 6 — Combat & Equipment (#70)

**Dependency:** #12 (core resolution)
**Est. Effort:** Medium

### Goal
Design the combat round structure — initiative, action economy, and turn flow.

### Design Philosophy
- Combat is fast and cinematic — resolve quickly, move on
- Attacks always hit — no attack rolls, only damage determination
- The action economy should feel intuitive: "I do one big thing or two small things"

### Round Structure
1. **Determine Initiative** — Agility-based, possibly with card draw (like Neon Relic)
2. **Take Turns** — Each participant takes one turn per round
3. **End of Round** — Check conditions, ongoing effects

### Action Economy
| Action Type | Cost | Examples |
|-------------|------|----------|
| **Standard Action** | 1 | Attack, cast spell, use ability, dash |
| **Move Action** | 1 | Move up to speed, stand up, mount/dismount |
| **Bonus Action** | 0 (conditional) | Class features, quick items |
| **Reaction** | 0 (1 per round) | Opportunity attack, shield block |
| **Free Action** | 0 (unlimited) | Talk, drop item, gesture |

### Tasks
- [ ] Design initiative system
- [ ] Design action economy
- [ ] Design turn structure
- [ ] Design reactions and triggered actions
- [ ] Design surprise rules
- [ ] Design cover and positioning rules
